title: Student — Study Materials & Tools
content:
Overview


The Study Materials page provides students with free reference tools to support their learning. It includes a Scientific Calculator, five Formula Sheets, and a Unit Converter. All tools are available without enrolling in any course.



Scientific Calculator


A full-featured calculator with basic and scientific functions. It includes:


  • Basic operations: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentage
  • Scientific functions: Sine (sin), cosine (cos), tangent (tan), square root (√), powers (x^y), logarithms (log, ln)
  • Constants: Pi (π)
  • Parentheses: For grouping expressions
  • Clear and backspace: C clears everything, ⌫ removes the last character

The calculator displays the expression as it's typed and shows the result when equals (=) is pressed. It evaluates the full expression at once, respecting the order of operations.



Formula Sheets


Five formula reference sheets are available, each opened by clicking its card:


Geometry Formulas:


  • 2D shapes: Square, rectangle, triangle, circle, parallelogram, rhombus, trapezium, kite — area and perimeter formulas
  • 3D shapes: Cube, cuboid, sphere, cylinder, cone, pyramid — volume and surface area formulas
  • Theorems: Pythagorean theorem, Heron's formula, circle theorems (arc length, sector area)

Physics Formulas:


  • Kinematics: Velocity, displacement, acceleration formulas (suvat equations)
  • Dynamics: Newton's second law, weight, momentum, impulse, centripetal force
  • Energy: Kinetic energy, potential energy, strain energy, power, work
  • Electricity: Ohm's law, electrical power, Coulomb's law, resistors in series and parallel, capacitance
  • Heat: Heat capacity, specific heat capacity, latent heat, ideal gas law
  • Waves: Wave speed, frequency and period, wave equation

Chemistry Formulas:


  • Stoichiometry: Moles, molarity, dilution, percentage yield
  • Gas laws: Ideal gas law, Boyle's law, Charles's law, Avogadro's law
  • Thermochemistry: Enthalpy change, Hess's law, calorimetry
  • Acids and bases: pH scale, pOH scale, dissociation constants
  • Kinetics: Rate of reaction, rate law, Arrhenius equation

Algebra Formulas:


  • Quadratic equations: Quadratic formula, discriminant, sum and product of roots
  • Exponents and logarithms: Exponent rules, logarithm rules, change of base
  • Sequences and series: Arithmetic and geometric sequences, infinite geometric series
  • Algebraic identities: Square and cube expansions, difference of squares, sum and difference of cubes
  • Functions: Composition, inverse functions, distance formula

Each formula sheet is organized into clearly labeled categories. A back button returns to the main tools grid.



Unit Converter


Converts between units in four categories:


  • Length: Millimeters, centimeters, meters, kilometers, inches, feet, yards, miles
  • Time: Seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, months (30 days), years (365 days)
  • Mass: Milligrams, grams, kilograms, ounces, pounds, tons
  • Temperature: Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin

To use: enter a value, select the source unit, click the exchange button, and the converted value appears in the result field with the target unit.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "All study tools are free and available without enrolling in any course."
  • "The calculator follows standard order of operations — use parentheses for complex expressions."
  • "Formula sheets are organized by category. Click any card to open it, then use the back button to return."
  • "The unit converter handles length, time, mass, and temperature — enter a value, pick your units, and click the exchange button."
